mapper.select: SELECT userInfo.USER_ID AS toUserId, userInfo.EMAIL AS toMail, COALESCE(position.POSITION_NM, '') AS approvalGrade FROM DOCS_USER userInfo LEFT JOIN DOCS_POSITION position ON userInfo.POSITION_CD = position.POSITION_CD WHERE userInfo.USER_NM = #{value}
SELECT USER_ID AS toUserId, EMAIL AS toEmail FROM DOCS_USER WHERE USER_CD = #{approvalUser}

SELECT docsUser.USER_NM AS toUserId, docsUser.EMAIL AS toMail, company.BIZ_NO AS bizNo FROM DOCS_USER docsUser JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_DEPLOY deploy ON deploy.DEPLOY_USER_CD = docsUser.USER_CD JOIN DOCS_COMPANY company ON docsUser.COMPANY_CD = company.COMPANY_CD WHERE deploy.REQUEST_NO = #{requestNo}

SELECT docsUser.USER_ID AS toUserId, docsUser.EMAIL AS toMail FROM DOCS_USER docsUser JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_DETAIL detail ON detail.ACTUAL_USER_CD = docsUser.USER_CD WHERE detail.REQUEST_NO = #{requestNo} AND detail.APPROVAL_GRADE_CD = 'DEF'
SELECT docsUser.USER_ID AS toUserId, docsUser.EMAIL AS toEmail FROM DOCS_USER docsUser JOIN DOCS_REQUEST request ON docsUser.USER_CD = request.INSERT_USER_CD WHERE request.REQUEST_NO = #{requestNo}
SELECT docsUser.USER_ID AS toUserId, docsUser.EMAIL AS toEmail FROM DOCS_USER docsUser JOIN DOCS_REQUEST request ON docsUser.USER_CD = request.INSERT_USER_CD WHERE request.REQUEST_NO = #{requestNo}

SELECT docsUser.USER_ID AS toUserId, docsUser.EMAIL AS toEmail FROM DOCS_USER docsUser JOIN DOCS_REQUEST request ON docsUser.USER_CD = request.INSERT_USER_CD WHERE request.REQUEST_NO = ( SELECT REQUEST_NO FROM DOCS_REQUEST_MAPPING WHERE OBJECT_ID = #{crNo} LIMIT 1 )

SELECT EMAIL FROM DOCS_USER WHERE USER_CD IN ( WITH USERLIST AS ( SELECT DEPLOY_EMAIL_CC USER_CD FROM DOCS_REQUEST_DEPLOY WHERE REQUEST_NO = #{requestNo} ) SELECT TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(USER_CD, '[^,]+', 1, LEVEL)) AS USER_CD FROM USERLIST CONNECT BY INSTR(USER_CD, ',', 1, LEVEL - 1) > 0 )
SELECT docsUser.USER_ID AS toUserId, docsUser.EMAIL AS toEmail FROM DOCS_USER docsUser WHERE docsUser.COMPANY_CD = #{companyCd}
SELECT AUTH_SITE AS authSite, DOCS_COMPANY.COMPANY_NM AS companyNm FROM DOCS_USER LEFT JOIN DOCS_COMPANY ON DOCS_COMPANY.COMPANY_CD = DOCS_USER.COMPANY_CD WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}

SELECT docsUser.EMAIL FROM DOCS_USER docsUser JOIN DOCS_REQUEST_DETAIL reqDetail ON docsUser.USER_CD = reqDetail.ACTUAL_USER_CD WHERE reqDetail.REQUEST_NO = #{requestNo} AND reqDetail.APPROVAL_STATUS_CD = 'ACCEPT'

SELECT MAIL_ID AS processSeq, FROM_MAIL AS fromMail, TO_MAIL AS toMail, TITLE AS title, CONTENT AS content, RESULT AS result, MAIL_TYPE AS mailEnum, REVISION_MAIL_ID AS referenceKeys FROM DOCS_MAIL WHERE RESULT = 'I' AND MAIL_ID > 561 ORDER BY MAIL_ID ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE DOCS_MAIL SET RESULT = #{result}, DETAIL = #{detail}, UPDATE_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE MAIL_ID = #{processSeq}
